IFBA Global Mentorship Program
The IFBA Global Mentorship Program is a worldwide initiative to support and sustain the international biosafety and biosecurity community. Mentors and Mentees are brought together to discuss regional/global issues pertaining to biosafety, biosecurity, and biorisk management. Mentees receive guidance in obtaining IFBA Professional Certifications and other career developing skills, and mentors may put their experience towards renewing their existing IFBA Professional Certifications.
IFBA Latin America and Caribbean (LAC) Mentorship Program 2024 – 2025
The recent Latin America and Caribbean (LAC) Mentorship program cycle began in October 2024, and ended in September 2025. Please read the linked documents to learn more about the program and the application process.
IFBA LAC Mentorship 2024 2025 Flyer
If you have any questions about the IFBA LAC or Global Mentorship Program please contact Stephanie Norlock at s.norlock@
The IFBA LAC Mentorship Program 2024-2025 at a Glance
Participants of the IFBA LAC Mentorship Program 2024-2025 have been active with program activities. Some of these activities involve review of guidance or best practices documents, discussions with experts in the field, and creative engagement with biosafety and biosecurity knowledge. Some of the creative outputs of the mentees have been sampled below. The sampled work includes awareness posters, crossword puzzles, and short quizzes. Mentees are also given opportunities to network with other mentees and mentors as well as with invited biosafety and biosecurity professionals.
